title: Drive sync complete; workflow-as-data and visualizer open
fam-hub plan review returns four active parents and no warnings
fam-hub task promote --dry-run previews registry task promotion
fam-hub run start supports dry-run JSONL record creation
Workbench Plan mode renders consolidated four-plan state through launchd-managed Studio

checked_text: Build Intent, Fulfillment Trace, and Workflow Data
Rebuild Workbench against frozen UI foundation

summary: Workbench Foundation now uses the frozen seven-domain left nav, shows explicit workspace contract pills, exposes seven workspace contracts in data, and keeps Media Studio prompt-first.
BuildIntent V2 was declared current, parallelBuild now emits durable build-trace stage events, and workflow-as-data phase 1 has a catalog-only stage contract without execution-order changes.
MBSH deploy repo boundary documented and nine site-scoped child tasks added for backend, RSVP, sponsor, deploy, media, chatbot, content, audit harness, and generalized gap promotion.
Actual Shay-Shay UI system-status call was proven through Studio. The run found and fixed a click-layer pointer bug and a PointerEvent-as-message bug before passing.
Workbench Foundation registers as ShayContextRegistry provider workbench.foundation; actual Shay-Shay UI call through Studio received page_context domain media and answered from that context.

Three site workflow modes are now defined as explicit contracts: new_site_from_brief, adapt_existing_site, and rebuild_from_brief, with state, permission, config discovery, execution, proof, and gap boundaries.

MBSH v2 backend endpoint inventory completed. Runtime endpoint execution remains blocked by missing local/production config secrets, but endpoint methods, payloads, persistence tables, config needs, and follow-up consumers are documented.
blockers: Production API_BASE_URL remains null in public site-config.json.

summary: First usable knowledge-capture pass added as fam-hub capture extract. It reads a designated source and writes review-only JSON/Markdown packets with decisions, breakthroughs, gaps, lessons, contradictions, and proposed destinations; no canonical memory files are modified.

MBSH RSVP frontend submission was verified in a real browser against the actual page with the API call intercepted. The anti-bot timing helper and public attendee opt-out serialization were fixed in the deploy repo; backend persistence/email/export smoke tests remain blocked by missing runtime config/secrets.
blockers: Backend RSVP runtime execution needs configured database/email/secrets.

summary: MBSH sponsor modal submission was verified in a real browser against the actual tickets page with the API call intercepted. The shared anti-bot timing helper was fixed in the deploy repo; backend persistence/email/admin smoke tests remain blocked by missing runtime config/secrets.
blockers: Backend sponsor runtime execution needs configured database/email/secrets.

summary: MBSH deploy proof packet now documents the frontend/backend/DNS/config/smoke/rollback path and exact blockers. Live deploy proof cannot honestly pass until external Netlify, DNS, GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL, Resend, and production API_BASE_URL access are available.
blockers: Missing Netlify/DNS/GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL/Resend access in this session.
Production API_BASE_URL remains null until backend origin is provisioned.

summary: api.mbsh96reunion.com now resolves through GoDaddy DNS to the cPanel backend, has a valid Let's Encrypt certificate installed in cPanel, and passes the platform smoke suite against the canonical API origin with dns_fallback=false.

Workbench pipeline visualizer phase 1 is implemented with inspect, trace, and propose lanes. Browser proof confirmed the visualizer renders the workflow catalog, calls /api/workflow/stage-catalog, and shows trace status without console errors.

MBSH media/story verification found brand, mascot, and hero/background assets present, but Story and Through the Years reference seven missing frontend/assets/story/*.jpg files and rights/approval state for archival or crowd-sourced gallery assets is not discoverable.
blockers: Missing rights/approval manifest for archival/crowd-sourced gallery media

summary: Hi-Tide Harry Chatbot Phase 1 opens in a real browser, answers all eight FAQ prompts, and emits fallback collector payload. Backend persistence/email smoke remains blocked by runtime config/secrets.
blockers: Backend chatbot runtime execution needs configured DB/email/secrets.

summary: MBSH content delta verification confirms the seven-page V1 architecture and core copy are present, with launch placeholders remaining for date/venue/payment, story media, playlist ID, seed data, and backend proof.

MBSH Studio reproduction audit harness is documented with exact full prompt, method, required checks, current proof boundary, and reusable platform gaps. Actual Studio reproduction run remains a future execution step.
blockers: Actual full Studio reproduction build has not been run in this checkpoint.

summary: MBSH-specific blockers and generalized platform gaps are separated. Generalized gaps are mapped to the existing four parent plans instead of creating new parallel plans.
